title: Setlist
description: A setlist file containing one or more presets and optional global config.

global.description: Global device settings (MIDI routing, clock, etc.). Applied once on upload.

presets.description: List of presets. Each preset defines the complete button/encoder/expression layout for one song or scene.

version.description: Schema version (currently 1). Tools use this to determine compatibility. Omit for v1 (assumed). Required from v2 onward.

ActionYaml.description: A single action in a multi-action sequence. Exactly one type per entry.

delay.description: Delay in milliseconds before the next action.

channel.description: MIDI channel (1-16). Inherits from button if omitted.
MIDI channel (1-16). Inherits from button if omitted.
MIDI channel (1-16). Inherits from button if omitted.

AnalogYamlConfig.description:
Expression pedal (analog input) configuration.

The raw ADC reading is clamped to the calibrated range (from global.calibration), then linearly mapped to the min–max CC range. Values below adc_min produce `min`; values above adc_max produce `max`. A value overlay appears on the OLED when moving.

label.description: Display label for the expression pedal overlay.

max.description: Maximum CC value at toe position. Default: 127.

min.description: Minimum CC value at heel position. Default: 0.

ButtonConfig.description:
Button configuration. Use one of: note, cc, program_change, or actions for the MIDI message.

**Modes:** - Momentary (default): active while pressed. Fires on_press on press, on_release on release. - Toggle (`toggle: true`): alternates active/inactive each press. Press when OFF → fires on_press. Press when ON → fires on_release (deactivation). LED stays lit while active. - RadioGroup (`radio_group: N`): only one button in group N active at a time. Pressing one silently deactivates others (no on_release fired for deactivated buttons).

**CcCycle** (`cc` + `values`): each press sends the next value in the list, wrapping around. With `reverse: true`, cycles backward. Cycle index persists in EEPROM across power cycles.

**Long press** (`on_long_press`): hold >500ms for secondary action. When configured, the normal on_press is deferred until release (if released before 500ms threshold).

actions.description: Multi-action sequence: list of MIDI messages sent in order on press (max 8). Supports CC, Program Change, Note On, and Delay between actions. Overrides cc/note/program_change shorthand fields.

animation.description: LED animation when active. Values: solid, blink, pulse, rotate, colorcycle.

cc.description: Send Control Change. Combined with toggle/values for different behaviors.

channel.description: MIDI channel (1-16). Default: 1. Applies to all actions on this button unless overridden per-action.

color.description: LED ring color when active. Values: red, green, blue, yellow, cyan, magenta, white, orange, purple, off, or #RRGGBB hex.

label.description: Display label shown on OLED (max 16 characters).

level.description: Level mode: LED brightness reflects CC value (for multi-LED visualization).

listen_cc.description: Reactive LED: ring shows heatmap proportional to incoming CC value. Format: { cc: N, channel: N }

note.description: Send Note On/Off. Button press = Note On (velocity 127), release = Note Off.

on_long_press.description: Action on long press (hold > 500ms). Values: next_preset, prev_preset. When configured, the normal on_press is deferred until release — if released before 500ms, fires on_press; if held past 500ms, fires only the long-press action.

radio_group.description: Radio group ID (0-255): only one button in the group can be active at a time. Pressing one deactivates others silently (no on_release MIDI sent for deactivated buttons).

renderer.description: LED spatial renderer. Values: solid (all 12), fill (partial arc), single (one LED), dots (evenly-spaced).

renderer_param.description: Renderer parameter: fill count (1-12), single position (0-11), or dot count (1-6).

reverse.description: Reverse cycle direction: index decrements on each press, wrapping from 0 to last entry.

toggle.description: Toggle mode: alternates between on_press (active) and on_release (inactive) on each press. LED stays lit while active. First press activates (sends CC=value), second press deactivates (sends CC=0 for the shorthand form, or fires on_release actions).

value.description: CC value to send (default: 127). For toggle mode, this is the ON value.

values.description: CC cycle values: each press sends the next value in the list (max 12). Use with cc field. First press sends values[0], second sends values[1], etc. Wraps around after the last value. Cycle index persists in EEPROM across power cycles.

DefaultsConfig.description:
Default initial state for a preset on first activation after upload.

Determines which toggles start ON and encoder starting positions. After initial activation, runtime state is preserved in EEPROM across power cycles and takes precedence over these defaults.

buttons.description: Button keys (A-F) mapped to "on" or "off". Omitted buttons default to off.

encoders.description: Encoder keys (Vol, Gain) mapped to initial value (0-127). Omitted encoders default to 0.

EncoderConfig.description:
Rotary encoder configuration.

Three modes: - **cc** (default): Absolute CC (0-127), increments/decrements per detent click. Clamped at min/max. Acceleration sends a single message with the final value. - **relative**: Sends fixed increment/decrement values (for gear expecting relative CC encoding). - **preset_scroll**: No MIDI output. Scrolls through presets (CW = next, CCW = prev).

Encoder values persist across preset switches and power cycles via EEPROM. A large value overlay appears on the OLED briefly when turning.

cc.description: MIDI CC number to send (0-127). Used in cc and relative modes.

channel.description: MIDI channel (1-16). Default: 1. Used in cc and relative modes.

decrement.description: Value sent on counter-clockwise turn. Only for relative mode. Default: 63.

increment.description: Value sent on clockwise turn. Only for relative mode. Default: 65.

label.description: Display label shown on OLED overlay when turning.

max.description: Maximum CC value (default: 127). Only for cc mode.

min.description: Minimum CC value (default: 0). Only for cc mode.

ExpCalibration.description: Min/max ADC values for a single expression pedal (0-4095).

max.description: ADC value at toe (full) position. Default: 3750.

min.description: ADC value at heel (rest) position. Default: 0.

GlobalYamlConfig.description: Global device configuration — system-wide settings independent of presets.

bpm.description: MIDI Clock tempo in BPM (30-300). Default: 120.

din_enabled.description: Enable DIN MIDI output for locally-generated messages. Default: true.

din_to_usb_thru.description: Route incoming DIN MIDI to USB MIDI out. Default: true.

midi_clock.description: Enable MIDI Clock output. Default: false.

usb_to_din_thru.description: Route incoming USB MIDI to DIN MIDI out. Default: false.

usb_to_usb_thru.description: Route incoming USB MIDI back to USB MIDI out (echo). Default: false.

ListenCcYaml.description:
Reactive CC binding for LED visualization.

Makes the button's LED ring respond to incoming MIDI CC from external gear. In heatmap mode, ring fill is proportional to CC value (0=off, 127=all 12 LEDs). In trigger mode, LED turns on (with button's color/animation) when value ≥ threshold.

cc.description: MIDI CC number to listen for (0-127).

channel.description: MIDI channel to listen on (1-16). Default: 1.

threshold.description: Threshold for trigger mode (0-127). Value ≥ threshold = on. Default: 64.

PresetConfig.description: A single preset — one song or scene in your setlist.

analog.description: Expression pedal configurations keyed by jack: Exp1, Exp2.

buttons.description: Button configurations keyed by position: A, B, C, D, E, F.

defaults.description: Initial state on first activation after upload. Determines which toggles start ON and encoder starting positions.

encoders.description: Encoder configurations keyed by position: Vol (left), Gain (right).

name.description: Preset name displayed on the OLED (max 16 characters).

on_enter.description: MIDI messages sent automatically when this preset becomes active (on switch or boot). Fires on: preset switch (encoder scroll, long-press, or trigger), and boot (for the active preset).

on_exit.description: MIDI messages sent automatically when leaving this preset (before switching to another).

triggers.description: Incoming MIDI triggers: react to external messages by changing button state or switching presets.

TriggerActionYaml.description:
Action to perform when a trigger matches.

- Activate: set button LED on (no outgoing MIDI). - Deactivate: set button LED off (no outgoing MIDI). - PresetSelect: switch to preset by 0-based index. - Execute: fire the button's on_press actions as if physically pressed.

TriggerMatchYaml.description:
MIDI message pattern to match.

CC: matches Control Change with optional value range (value_gte/value_lt). ProgramChange: matches exact program number on channel. NoteOn: matches Note On with velocity > 0 only (velocity 0 = Note Off, not matched).

TriggerYaml.description:
A trigger that reacts to incoming MIDI.

Multiple triggers can match the same incoming message — all matching triggers fire. Triggers only affect LED state and system actions; they don't generate outgoing MIDI unless using Execute (which fires a button's on_press actions).

action.description: Action to perform. One of: { activate: "A" }, { deactivate: "B" }, { preset_select: 0 }, { execute: "C" }

match.description: What MIDI message to match. One of: { cc, channel, value_gte?, value_lt? }, { program_change, channel }, { note, channel }
